name: Pawsmonaut Games
short_description: Scottish solo-indie studio creating deep experiences without micro-transactions, battle passes or predatory monetisation.
about: Pawsmonaut Games is a proud Scottish solo-independent game development studio, founded in 2023 to create deep, compelling experiences without micro-transactions, battle passes or predatory monetisation.

news.title: OUT NOW: Pawsmonaut Games Launches AETHUS
